name: ContactType
title: DRKS Contact Type
description: Contact and material support type codes for DRKS-registered studies that are not covered by the standard FHIR research-study-party-role code system.

concept.definition: Material or monetary support provided by a commercial entity.
Material or monetary support provided through private sponsorship.
Material or monetary support provided by an institution.
The primary ethics committee responsible for reviewing and approving the study.
An additional ethics committee involved in the review of the study, beyond the primary ethics committee.
